name: Plexian AB (publ)
summary: Plexian AB (Publ), a fintech company, develops transaction-based loyalty platform. It develops Edge, a sales-driven loyalty platform, which generates offers for customers who use the Visa card belonging to the platform for payments. The data generated by the transactions is used in Edge to provide customers with tailor-made offers that daily consumption and increase customer loyalty. The company was founded in 2017 and is based in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
